title: ICAI Defers Effective Date for SQM 1 and SQM 2 – Big Relief for Firms!
content:
# ICAI Defers Effective Date for SQM 1 and SQM 2 – Big Relief for Firms!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Standards on Quality Management (SQM) 1 aur SQM 2 ki mandatory effective date ko defer kar diya hai. This is a significant development for all practicing Chartered Accountant firms.

Here's a quick rundown of what you need to know:

*   **Original Mandatory Effective Date:** SQM 1 and SQM 2 were scheduled to become mandatorily effective from April 1, 2026.
*   **New Mandatory Effective Date:** The Council of ICAI, at its 451st Meeting held on March 30th and 31st, 2026, has decided to defer the mandatory effective date of SQM 1 and SQM 2 until further announcement.
*   **What this means:** Until a new announcement is made by ICAI, the existing Standard on Quality Control (SQC) 1 will continue to remain applicable for all firms.

This deferment provides additional time for firms to prepare and implement the new Quality Management Standards.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post/announcement-on-deferment-of-effective-date-of-sqm-1-and-sqm-2-31-03-2026)

*Published on: 1 April 2026*
